page_metadata.biotools__summary: Automated identification of genes encoding bacteriocins and (non)-bacteriocidal post-translationally modified peptides using updated bacteriocin and context protein databases. Input is single or multiple FASTA formatted files.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Automated identification of genes encoding bacteriocins and (non)-bacteriocidal post-translationally modified peptides using updated bacteriocin and context protein databases. Input is single or multiple FASTA formatted files.
